prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第84名，近年排名稳定在75–84区间，属中上水平理工类院校；近年声誉 平稳，未见明显负面舆情或投档断档记录；抖音热度未进入全国前100，短视频曝光一般，报考关注度处于正常水平；电气工程A（全国顶尖）、动力工程及工程 热物理A-，电力行业龙头地位稳固，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电气工程及其自动化2024年高热推荐、能源动力推荐（66.43）、电子信息/通信高热推荐（76.86），华电核心专业与当前热门方向高度吻合；本省2026年普通高考总人数约60.98万，较2025年微增，物理类 考生约36.6万，竞争略有上升，2025年物理类本科批459分、特殊类型499分，近年呈上升趋势。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年计划小幅 扩招（+3.4%）、本省考生微增及电气等核心专业热度高企，在2025年基准16339名基础上预计竞争继续加剧；预测最低位次约16704名，区间16204–17204名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 9711 → 10996 → 14804 → 15387 → 16339, continuously shifting backward for 5 consecutive years, with a cumulative shift of about 6628 places; in the recent 3 years (2023–2025), it shifted backward by about 1535 places, with a baseline of approximately 16339 in 2025, showing a clear backward trend; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was stable at 95–96 students from 2021 to 2024, expanded to 117 in 2025, and further expanded to 121 in 2026, an increase of 4 students (+3.4%) compared to 2025, with a slight expansion slightly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; ranked 84th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a stable ranking in the 75–84 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level of science and engineering institutions; its reputation has been stable in recent years, with no obvious negative public opinion or enrollment gaps; Douyin popularity has not entered the national top 100, short video exposure is average, and application attention is at a normal level; Electrical Engineering is rated A (top in the country), Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics are rated A-, with a solid leading position in the power industry, strongly attracting applications for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electrical Engineering and Automation was a high-heat recommendation in 2024, Energy and Power Engineering recommended (66.43), Electronic Information/Communication high-heat recommendation (76.86); NCEPU's core majors are highly aligned with current popular directions; the total number of regular college entrance examination students in the province in 2026 is about 609,800, a slight increase from 2025, with about 366,000 Physics Category examinees, competition slightly rising; in 2025, the Physics Category undergraduate batch line was 459 points, special type line 499 points, showing an upward trend in recent years.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the slight expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan (+3.4%), a slight increase in provincial examinees, and the high popularity of core majors such as Electrical Engineering, competition is expected to intensify further based on the 2025 baseline of 16339; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 16704, with a range of 16204–17204.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 16204–17204, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Energy and Power Engineering, Automation, Electronic Information), with Tier 1 Electrical/Computer Science as a reach; for rankings significantly better than the lower bound (e.g., within 16000), one can focus on impacting top-tier majors like Electrical Engineering and Automation; for rankings near the upper bound (above 17000), it is recommended to mainly rely on Tier 3 as a safety option.
